Engineering Standup Notes — March 2024: The backend team completed the authentication service refactor and merged the feature branch to main on March 4. Frontend is blocked on the design handoff for the new dashboard; ticket has been escalated to the design lead for resolution by end of week. Infrastructure work on the Kubernetes cluster autoscaling policies is 80% complete with testing expected to wrap up Thursday. No new blockers from the QA team; the regression suite is passing cleanly against the staging environment.
